name: leadpipe-mcp
description: AI lead qualification engine with ICP pre-filter, 6-dimension scoring (0-100), company enrichment via Hunter.io, and CRM export to HubSpot/Pipedrive/CSV. 10 tools, 3 resources, 3 prompts.

tools.name: lead_demo_seed
tools.description: Seed 14 demo leads across 5 archetypes for evaluation without API keys

tools.name: lead_qualify
tools.description: ICP pre-filter BEFORE enrichment — freemail/title/country/industry/tech-stack criteria, saves Hunter.io credits

tools.name: lead_enrich
tools.description: Enrich lead with company data via Hunter.io + domain heuristics

tools.name: lead_score
tools.description: AI qualification score 0-100 across 6 weighted dimensions

tools.name: lead_search
tools.description: Search and filter leads with pagination

tools.name: lead_export
tools.description: Export qualified leads to HubSpot, Pipedrive, CSV, or JSON

tools.name: pipeline_stats
tools.description: Pipeline analytics with conversion rates, score distribution, source breakdown

tools.name: config_scoring
tools.description: Configure scoring weights, high-value titles/industries, custom rules

resources.description: Pipeline summary with status counts and conversion rates
